description: Allies within radius gain bonus armor and percent armor. Nearby Vanguards with this perk form a formation, amplifying each other's auras.
tooltipTemplate: Allies within {radius} units gain +{bonusArmor} armor and +{armorPercent%} percent armor. Each nearby Vanguard with this perk adds +{synergyRadiusBonus} radius, +{synergyArmorBonus} armor, and +{synergyArmorPercentBonus%} percent armor to your aura.

description: When an ally nearby takes damage, a portion is redirected to this Vanguard first.
tooltipTemplate: When an ally within {radius} units is hit, you absorb {redirectPercent%} of the incoming damage.

description: After holding position, plant a banner that grants allies bonus armor and attack speed. The banner persists after you move or fall. Replanting requires a cooldown.
tooltipTemplate: After standing still for {stationaryThresholdSeconds:1}s, plant a banner ({bannerRadius} radius, lasts {bannerDurationSeconds:1}s) that grants nearby allies +{bannerArmorBonus} armor and +{bannerAttackSpeedBonus%} attack speed. Replant cooldown: {cooldownSeconds:1}s.
